subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में किस नामक क़ंदरगाँव है?
explanation_en: Jaigarh Fort is a famous fort located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. It was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II during the 17th century.
